title: Optimization Suggestion
description: Schema for a single optimization suggestion generated by performance-agent.

id.description: Suggestion identifier from the knowledge base (e.g., COMM-01, COMP-02).

title.description: Human-readable title of the optimization suggestion.

priority.description: Priority level based on expected impact.

trigger_metric.description: The metric and value that triggered this suggestion.

actions.description: Ordered list of concrete actions to take.

code_examples.description: Framework-specific code examples (keyed by framework name).

config_examples.description: Framework-specific configuration examples (keyed by framework name).

validation_metrics.description: Metrics to compare before and after applying the optimization.
